description_long: This is a classic cruiser-style bicycle with a distinctive green frame and gold-accented wheels, mounted on a black display platform with a metal bike rack. The frame features sweeping, curved tubes and a high-rise 'ape hanger' handlebar, giving it a retro aesthetic. The seat is a wide, cushioned comfort saddle, positioned for an upright riding posture. Both wheels are spoked and fitted with black tires, and the pedals and chain are visible on the right side. The bike rack is integrated into the display, suggesting a secure parking scenario. A gold plaque is mounted on the platform, adding a decorative or informational touch.
description: A green cruiser bicycle with gold wheels, ape hanger handlebars, and a comfort saddle, displayed on a black platform with a bike rack.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full green frame, gold wheels, comfort saddle, and the right-side chain and pedals.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the tall ape hanger handlebars, front wheel, and the bike rack structure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the left side of the frame, gold wheels, and the platform with the rack.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the comfort saddle, rear wheel, and the bike rack enclosure.
